import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from "react"; import ReactMarkdown from "react-markdown"; const campuses = [ { name: "Islamabad", established: "1997", desc: "Oldest and main campus with a strong computing culture and active student life.", tag: "HQ" }, { name: "Lahore", established: "2000", desc: "One of the largest and most competitive campuses in the FAST network.", tag: "" }, { name: "Karachi", established: "2000", desc: "Located in Pakistan's economic hub with strong industry exposure.", tag: "" }, { name: "Peshawar", established: "2001", desc: "Serving students from KPK and surrounding regions.", tag: "" }, { name: "Chiniot-Faisalabad", established: "2012", desc: "Located near Pakistan's industrial center with strong industry connections.", tag: "" }, { name: "Multan", established: "2025", desc: "Newest campus expanding FAST's reach in South Punjab.", tag: "New" }, ]; const programs = [ { category: "Computing", list: ["BS Computer Science", "BS Software Engineering", "BS Artificial Intelligence", "BS Data Science", "BS Cyber Security"] }, { category: "Engineering", list: ["BS Computer Engineering", "BS Electrical Engineering", "BS Civil Engineering"] }, { category: "Business", list: ["BBA", "BS Accounting & Finance", "BS Business Analytics"] }, ]; const stats = [ { value: "6", label: "Campuses" }, { value: "11,000+", label: "Students" }, { value: "500+", label: "Faculty Members" }, { value: "25+", label: "Years of Excellence" }, ]; const admissionSteps = [ { step: "01", title: "Check Eligibility", desc: "Matric 60%+ and FSc 50%+ with Mathematics. O/A-Level students need IBCC equivalence." }, { step: "02", title: "Choose Entry Test", desc: "Apply via FAST NU Test, NTS NAT, or SAT. Select your preferred route during application." }, { step: "03", title: "Merit Calculation", desc: "NU Test route: 50% test score + 40% FSc marks + 10% Matric marks." }, { step: "04", title: "Apply Online", desc: "No interview required for undergraduate admissions. Submit your application online." }, ]; function App() { const [messages, setMessages] = useState([]); const [input, setInput] = useState(""); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false); const [activeProgram, setActiveProgram] = useState(0); const bottomRef = useRef(null); const chatRef = useRef(null); useEffect(() => { bottomRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" }); }, [messages]); const sendMessage = async (text) => { const msg = text || input; if (!msg.trim()) return; const userMessage = { role: "user", content: msg }; setMessages((prev) => [...prev, userMessage]); setInput(""); setLoading(true); chatRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" }); try { const response = await fetch("http://127.0.0.1:8000/chat", { method: "POST", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" }, body: JSON.stringify({ session_id: "student1", message: msg }), }); const data = await response.json(); setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role: "assistant", content: data.reply }]); } catch { setMessages((prev) => [...prev, { role: "assistant", content: "Sorry, I could not connect to the server. Please try again." }]); } setLoading(false); }; return (
{/* NAV */}
FAST-NUCES
Programs Campuses Admission Ask AI Assistant
{/* HERO */}
Federally Chartered University · Est. 1997

Pakistan's Leading
Technology University

Join 11,000+ students across 6 campuses. Build your future in Computing, Engineering, and Business with Pakistan's most respected tech university.

Ask Our AI Assistant View Admission Guide
{/* STATS */}

{stat.value} {stat.label}
))}
{/* PROGRAMS */}

What You Can Study

Undergraduate Programs

Choose from 11 undergraduate programs across Computing, Engineering, and Business.

{programs.map((p, i) => ( ))}
{programs[activeProgram].list.map((prog, i) => (
{prog}
))}
{/* CAMPUSES */}

Where We Are

6 Campuses Across Pakistan

From Peshawar to Karachi, FAST-NUCES brings world-class education to every corner of Pakistan.

{campuses.map((c, i) => (
{c.name} {c.tag && {c.tag}}
Est. {c.established}

{c.desc}

))}
{/* ADMISSION */}

How To Apply

Admission Process

No interviews. No complications. Just merit-based admissions in 4 simple steps.

{admissionSteps.map((step, i) => (
{step.step}

{step.title}

{step.desc}

))}

Merit Formula (NU Test Route)

50% Admission Test
+
40% FSc / HSSC
+
10% Matric / SSC
{/* FINANCIAL AID */}

Support For Students

Financial Assistance

FAST-NUCES believes financial constraints should never stop talented students.

2,000+ Students receiving financial aid
Rs. 60M FAST-funded financial assistance
Rs. 40M Donor-funded financial assistance
25%+ Female student population
{/* AI ASSISTANT */}

Got Questions?

Ask Our AI Assistant

Get instant answers about admissions, programs, fee structure, and campus life — available 24/7.

FAST Assistant · Online
{messages.length === 0 && (

Hi! I'm the FAST-NUCES AI Assistant. Ask me anything about admissions, programs, or campus life.

{["What is the fee structure?", "How is merit calculated?", "Which programs are offered?", "Tell me about financial aid"].map((q, i) => ( ))}
)} {messages.map((msg, i) => (
{msg.role === "assistant" &&
F
}
{msg.role === "user" ? msg.content : {msg.content}}
))} {loading && (

)}
setInput(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && sendMessage()} />

FAST Assistant may make mistakes. Always verify critical information with the admissions office.

{/* FOOTER */}
FAST-NUCES

National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences · Federally Chartered · Est. 1997

#ebebeb" }, statItem: { display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", padding: "32px 48px", borderRight: "1px solid #ebebeb" }, statValue: { fontSize: "32px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#1a3c5e" }, statLabel: { fontSize: "13px", color: "#888", marginTop: "4px" }, section: { padding: "80px 48px" }, sectionInner: { maxWidth: "1000px", margin: "0 auto" }, sectionTag: { fontSize: marginBottom: "12px" }, sectionSub: { fontSize: "16px", color: "#666", lineHeight: "1.7", marginBottom: "48px", maxWidth: "600px" }, tabs: { display: "flex", gap: "8px", marginBottom: "28px" }, tab: { padding: "8px 20px", borderRadius: "20px", border: "1px solid #e0e0e0", background: "#fff", fontSize: "14px", color: "#666", cursor: "pointer" }, tabActive: { padding: "8px 20px", borderRadius: "20px", border: "1px solid #1a3c5e", background: "#1a3c5e", fontSize: "14px", color: "#fff", cursor: "pointer" }, programGrid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr))", gap: "12px" }, programCard: { display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "12px", padding: "16px 20px", background: "#f8f9fa", borderRadius: "8px", border: "1px solid #ebebeb" }, programDot: { width: "8px", height: "8px", borderRadius: "50%", background: "#3498db", flexShrink: 0 }, programName: { fontSize: "14px", color: "#1a1a1a", fontWeight: "500" }, campusGrid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr))", gap: "20px" }, campusCard: { background: "#fff", border: "1px solid #ebebeb", borderRadius: "12px", padding: "24px" }, campusHeader: { campusDesc: { fontSize: "14px", color: "#666", lineHeight: "1.6", margin: 0 }, stepsGrid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fill, minmax(220px, 1fr))", gap: "20px", marginBottom: fontSize: "36px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#1a3c5e" }, meritLabel: { fontSize: "13px", color: "#888", marginTop: "4px" }, meritPlus: { fontSize: "24px", color: "#ccc", fontWeight: "300" }, aidGrid: textAlign: "center" }, aidValue: { fontSize: "28px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#1a3c5e", display: "block", marginBottom: "8px" }, aidLabel: { fontSize: "14px", color: "#666", lineHeight: "1.5" }, chatWrap: { border: "1px solid #ebebeb", borderRadius: "16px", overflow: "hidden", maxWidth: "720px", margin: "0 auto" }, chatHeader: { display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "10px", padding: "16px 20px", borderBottom: "1px solid #ebebeb", background: "#fff" }, chatDot: { width: "10px", height: "10px", borderRadius: "50%", background: "#2ecc71" }, chatHeaderText: { fontSize: "14px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#1a1a1a" }, chatBody: { height: "420px", overflowY: "auto", padding: "20px", background: "#fafafa" }, chatEmpty: { padding: "20px 0" }, chatEmptyText: { fontSize: "14px", color: "#666", lineHeight: "1.6", marginBottom: "16px" }, chipRow: { display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "8px" }, chip: { background: "#fff", border: "1px solid #e0e0e0", borderRadius: "16px", padding: "8px 14px", fontSize: "13px", color: "#444", cursor: "pointer" }, chatInput: { display: "flex", gap: "10px", padding: "14px 16px", borderTop: "1px solid #ebebeb", background: "#fff" }, userRow: { display: "flex", justifyContent: "flex-end", marginBottom: "14px" }, botRow: { display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-start", gap: "10px", marginBottom: "14px" }, avatar: { width: "30px", height: "30px", borderRadius: "50%", background: "#1a3c5e", color: "#fff", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "700", flexShrink: 0 }, userBubble: { background: "#1a3c5e", color: "#fff", padding: "10px 14px", borderRadius: "16px 16px 4px 16px", maxWidth: "65%", fontSize: "14px", lineHeight: "1.6" }, botBubble: { background: "#fff", border: "1px solid #ebebeb", color: "#1a1a1a", padding: "10px 14px", borderRadius: "4px 16px 16px 16px", maxWidth: "75%", fontSize: "14px", lineHeight: "1.6" }, typing: { color: "#aaa", letterSpacing: "4px", fontSize: "12px" }, input: { flex: 1, padding: "10px 16px", borderRadius: "20px", border: "1px solid #e0e0e0", fontSize: "14px", outline: "none", background: "#fafafa" }, send: { width: "40px", height: "40px", borderRadius: "50%", background: "#1a3c5e", color: "#fff", border: "none", fontSize: "16px", cursor: "pointer" }, sendDisabled: { width: "40px", height: "40px", borderRadius: "50%", background: "#ccc", color: "#fff", border: "none", fontSize: "16px", cursor: "not-allowed" }, disclaimer: { textAlign: "center", fontSize: "12px", color: "#aaa", marginTop: "16px" }, footer: { background: "#0d2137", padding: "40px 48px" }, footerInner: { maxWidth: "1000px", margin: "0 auto", textAlign: "center" }, footerLogo: { fontSize: "22px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#fff", display: "block", marginBottom: "12px" }, footerText: { fontSize: "13px", color: "#7f8c8d", lineHeight: "1.8", margin: "4px 0" }, }; export default App;
